panel_discord_widget: Discord widget — prostheste to ID tou server sas
download_full_client_desc: Plиris pelatis paixnidiou — protetimeno gia neous paiktes
login_failed: Mh egkyro onoma xrhsth h kodikos.
forgot_password_desc: Eisagete to onoma xristi kai to email sas gia epanaforora kodikoy.
forgot_password_not_found: Den vrethike logariasmox me ayto to onoma xristi kai email.
forgot_password_success: O kodikos epanaforethike. Mporite na syndethete tora.
validation_password_min: O kodikos prepei na echei toulachiston 6 xaraktires.
validation_login_min: To onoma xristi prepei na echei toulachiston 4 charakteres.
validation_login_max: To onoma xristi den mporei na xepernaei ta 30 charakteres.
validation_login_unique: Afto to onoma xristi einai idi kateilimmeno.
validation_email_unique: Afto to email einai idi kataxorimeno.
validation_securitycode_digits: O kodikos prepei na periecei akrives 7 psifia.
terms_acceptance_text: Me tin prosvasi i chrisi autis tis istoselidas kai tou server paihnidiou, apodeheste autous tous Orous Chrisis. An den simfonite, parakalume stamatiste tin chrisi amesa.
terms_service_text: To Metin2Ignition einai enas mi episimos idiotikos server gia to paihnidi Metin2. Den eimaste me kanena tropo sindedemenoi me tin NCSoft i tin Webzen. Auti i ipiresia parehete dorean gia psihagogikous skopous.
terms_accounts_text: Mporite na eggrafite enan logariasmo ana atomo. Oi logariasmi den einai metavivastoi. Diatiroume to dikaioma na anasteloume i na apokleisoume moima opoiondipote logariasmo pou paraviasei autous tous orous, horis proeidopoiisi i apozimiosi.
terms_conduct_1: Chrisi cheats, hacks, bots i opoioudipote logismikou triton pou parehei athelito pleonektima
terms_conduct_2: Ekmetalefsi sfalmaton i elattoton — anaferste ta stin omada
terms_conduct_3: Parenohilisi, ritsistiko logo i prostelitiko glossari pros allous paiktes i prosopiko
terms_shop_text: Oles oi agores sto eikoniko mas katastima einai oristikes. Ta eikonika antikeimena kai nomisma den ehoun pragmatiki hrimatiki axia kai den mporoun na antallahtoun me pragmatika hrimata.
terms_liability_text: Parehome auti tin ipiresia os ehei, horis kanena egiisi. O server mporei na tropopoiithei, na epanaferthei i na kleisei opoiadipote stigmi horis proeidopoiisi. Den eimasthe ipefthynoi gia opoiadipote apolia proodou, antikeimmenon i nomismatos sto paihnidi.
terms_ip_text: Ta stoiheia, grafika kai mihani tou paihnidiou Metin2 einai idioktisia tis NCSoft kai tis Webzen. Olo to prosarmosmeno periekhomeno kai oi tropopoiiseis pou dimiourgithikan apo tin omada Metin2Ignition paramenoun diki mas pnevmatiki idioktisia.
refund_general_text: Oles oi agores sto Metin2Ignition theorountai oristikes. Logo tis psifiakis fisis ton proionton mas, genika den prosferoume epistrofes meta tin oloklirosi tis agoras kai tin paradosi ton antikeimmenon.
refund_exceptions_text: Oi epistrofes mporoun na exetastoun stis akolouthes exairetikes peristaseis:
refund_exception_1: Hreothikate alla den lavate ta agorasmena antikeimena logo tehnikou sfalmatos apo tin plefra mas
refund_exception_2: Eginan dipla hreoseis gia tin idia sinallagi
refund_exception_3: I agora egine me dolio tropo kai mporite na proskomisete apodixeis
refund_process_text: Gia na zitisete epistrofi, epikinoniste me tin omada ipostiriis mas entos 7 imeron apo ti sinallagi. Perillavete to onoma logariasmu sas, to ID sinallagis, tin imerominia kai mia perigrafi tou provlimatos.
refund_contact_text: Steile to aitima epistrofis sas sto: contact@metin2ignition.com — Perillavete oles tis shetikes leptomereies.
privacy_data_text: Singoume ta akoloutha prosopika dedomena otan eggrafeste i hrisimopioite tin ipiresia mas:
privacy_data_4: Imerominia kai ora eggrafis kai teleftaias sindesis
privacy_purpose_text: Ta dedomena sas hrisimopioiuntai apokleistika gia tous akolouthous skopous:
privacy_purpose_2: Epikoinonia shetika me ton logariasmo sas (px. epanafoora kodiku prosvasis)
privacy_storage_text: Ta dedomena sas apothikeuontai me asfaleia stous servers mas. Diatirame ta dedomena logariasmu gia 2 hronia meta tin teleftaia sindesi sas. Mporite na zitisete diagrafi opoiadipote stigmi. Den pouloume kai den moirazoume ta prosopika sas dedomena me tritous.
privacy_rights_text: Simfona me to GDPR, ehete ta akoloutha dikaiomata:
privacy_right_1: Dikaioma prosvasis — mporite na zitisete antigrafo ton dedomenon pou diatiroume gia esas
privacy_right_2: Dikaioma diorthosis — mporite na zitisete diorthosi anakrivon dedomenon
privacy_right_3: Dikaioma diagrafis — mporite na zitisete diagrafi tou logariasmu kai ton dedomenon sas
privacy_right_4: Dikaioma periorismu — mporite na zitisete periorismo tis epexergasias ton dedomenon sas
privacy_cookies_text: Hrisimopioiume mono aparaitita cookies sinedrias pou apaitountai gia tin pistopoiisi. Den hrisimopioioume cookies parakolouthisis i diafimistika cookies triton.
privacy_contact_text: Gia opoiadipote aitimata shetika me dedomena, epikinoniste mazi mas sto: contact@metin2ignition.com — Tha apantisume entos 30 imeron opos apaititai apo to GDPR.
contact_intro: Ehete erotisi, vrikate ena sfalma i hriazeste voitheia? Epikinoniste mazi mas mesoo enos apo tous parakatoo troupous. Prospathoume na apantoume oso pio grigora ginetai.
contact_response_time: O mesos hronos apantisis mas einai 24-48 ores. Gia epigonta provlimata sto paihnidi, hrisimopioiste to Discord server mas gia takhyteri voitheia.
about_who_text: To Metin2Ignition einai ena ergo idiotikou server pou dimiourgithike apo mia pathiasmeni omada fan tou Metin2. Stokhos mas einai na prosferoume stin koinotita tou Metin2 mia freskia, isorropi kai efharisti empiria.
about_mission_text: Pisteuoume se mia dikaii, diaskestiki kai apo tin koinotita katefthinomeni empeiria paihnidiou. I omada mas ergazetai sineheia gia na veltiosi ton server, na diorthosi sfalmata, na prosthesei neo periekhomeno kai na diatirisei to paihnidi isorropo gia olous tous paikhtes.
about_disclaimer_text: To Metin2Ignition einai ena mi episimo ergo fan kai den einai sindedemenoo me tin NCSoft i tin Webzen. To Metin2 einai katahorimeno emporiko sima ton antoistoikhon idioktition.
download_antivirus_note: An o patcher den xekinaei, mporei na mplokaretai apo to antivirus sas. Prostetheste ton sti lista exaireseon i apenergopoiiste prosorina to antivirus.
shop_no_items: Den yparkhoun diathesima antikeimena auti ti stigmi.
shop_purchase_success: Epitykhi agora! To antikeimeno tha paradothei sto paixnidi.
coins_select_method: Parakalume epilexte mia methodo pliroms apo tis parakato epiloges.
coins_no_packages: Den yparkhoun diathesima paketa auti ti stigmi.
coins_coupon_used_up: Echete idi chrisimopoiisei auto to kouponi ton megisto arithmo foron.
coins_purchase_success: Epitykhi pliromi! Ta nomismata prosthethikan ston logariasmo sas.
coins_price_note: Oi times pou emfanizontai se topiko nomisma einai prosengistikes. I hreosi tha ginei se EUR.
